claim: TL;DR — The current stable Bun is v1.3.13, released April 20, 2026
TL;DR — The current stable Bun is v1.3.13, released April 20, 2026
The v1.3.x series has been the active stable line all of 2026
Bun ([oven-sh/bun](https://github.com/oven-sh/bun) ⭐ 89k) has shipped one minor patch roughly every 2–3 weeks in 2026, all on the v1.3.x line
| v1.3.13 | Apr 20, 2026 | 82 issues fixed; bun test --parallel/--isolate/--shard/--changed; install streams tarballs (17× less memory); 5.5× faster gzip via zlib-ng; range requests in Bun.serve()
- Bun has no formally defined support policy; only the latest version is treated as stable
- Install / upgrade: curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash or bun upgrade
- Bun is developed by Oven and the runtime entered 1.0 in September 2023; the 1.x series has been backwards-compatible since
